fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Master switch. When off, no Item write triggers any Meta API call.

fields.label: Catalog ID
fields.description: Numeric ID from Meta Commerce Manager (e.g. 1234567890123456)

fields.label: Reuse Token From WhatsApp Account
fields.description: Optional. If set, the access_token of this WhatsApp Account is used (avoids duplicating tokens). Must have catalog_management scope.

fields.label: Meta Access Token
fields.description: System User token with scopes: catalog_management (+ whatsapp_business_management if you also send product messages from here).

fields.label: Default Brand
fields.description: Used when Item has no brand.

fields.label: Default Condition
fields.options:
new
refurbished
used
used_like_new
used_good
used_fair

fields.label: Default Availability
fields.options:
in stock
out of stock
preorder
available for order
discontinued

fields.label: Price Markup %
fields.description: Optional positive percent added to Item standard_rate before publishing (e.g. 10 = sell on Meta at 10% above ERPNext price).

fields.label: Sync Only Website Items
fields.description: If on, only Item rows with show_in_website=1 (or with a Website Item record) are pushed. If off, every Item flows. Recommended ON to keep internal SKUs out of the customer-facing catalog.

fields.label: Public Image URL Base
fields.description: Public HTTPS prefix Meta can crawl, e.g. https://ventas.docomexico.com. Item.image (relative path) gets prepended with this. If empty, frappe.utils.get_url() is used.

fields.label: Fallback Image URL
fields.description: Used when an Item has no image. Public HTTPS PNG/JPG, square aspect ratio recommended (max 8 MB).
